title: PvP Crosshair V2 by Zent
description: Another Upcoming PvP Crosshair to enhance you Minecraft PvP Experience.........
body:
PvP Crosshair v2

by BattleZent

PvP Crosshair v2 is a clean, customizable crosshair pack designed for competitive Minecraft PvP.

This pack includes multiple crosshair styles optimized for accuracy, visibility, and focus — perfect for 1.8+ PvP, Bedwars, Practice, and SMP combat.

Features:

Multiple crosshair styles (dot, plus, hollow, minimal)

Clean and centered for precise aiming

High visibility without screen clutter

Works with most PvP texture packs

Lightweight and FPS-friendly

Why use PvP Crosshair v2?
A better crosshair means better tracking, faster reactions, and cleaner fights.

Just install, select your favorite style, and fight.
